ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "size_us" TEXT /* US size designation */,
  "size_uk" TEXT /* UK size designation */,
  "size_eu" TEXT /* EU size designation */,
  "chest_inch" TEXT /* Chest measurement range in inches */,
  "waist_inch" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in inches */,
  "seat_inch" TEXT /* Seat measurement range in inches */,
  "arm_length_inch" REAL /* Arm length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_inch" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "hip_inch" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_inch" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category */,
  "recommended_fit" TEXT /* Recommended fit for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer or model */,
  "chest_inch" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "seat_inch" REAL /* Seat measurement in inches */,
  "arm_length_inch" REAL /* Arm length measurement in inches */,
  "height_inch" REAL /* Height measurement in inches */,
  "weight_lb" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "shoulder_width_inch" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "hip_inch" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_inch" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the product in USD */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "size_uk" TEXT /* UK size designation */,
  "size_eu" TEXT /* EU size designation */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
